title: The Footwear Design and Development Institute Act, 2017
full_text: The Footwear Design and Development Institute Act, 2017 फुटवियर डिजाइन और विकास संस्थान अधिनियम, 2017 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 201720 Act Number: 20 Enactment Date: 2017-08-04 Act Year: 2017 Short Title: The Footwear Design and Development Institute Act, 2017 Hindi Title: फुटवियर डिजाइन और विकास संस्थान अधिनियम, 2017 Long Title: An Act to establish and declare the Footwear Design and Development Institute as an institution of national importance for the promotion and development of quality and excellence in education, research and training in all disciplines relating to footwear and leather products design and development and for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Commerce and Industry Department: Department of Commerce Enforcement Date: 16-10-2017 Notification: S.O. 3248(E) Part-II s. 3(ii) 5-10-2017 Schedule 1.
